description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers' understanding of the native `Date` API, emphasizing its quirks, methods, and practical use cases like formatting and localization. It uses an engaging, humorous tone to challenge assumptions about the class's difficulty, encouraging mastery without third-party libraries.
Topics: Date object methods, time handling, date formatting, localization, common pitfalls
Audience: JavaScript developers seeking to deepen their knowledge of the native Date API or reduce reliance on external libraries
